_README: Hand-curated overlay merged by build_roadbook.py on top of fresh OSM/Overpass + GPX data. Edit this, not the generated JS. Items here are NOT in the GPX and often NOT in OSM, so they must survive a route swap.

config.//downsample_m: target spacing of DATA.route points (display + km lookup)
config.//ele: moving-average half-window over full-res GPX ele; reproduces totalGain 17857 / maxEle 1421
config.//climb: min net gain for a 'sustained climb' row (live page ~23; partly editorial, review after swap)
config.//dip: a descent bigger than this splits/ends a climb
config.//shop: SHOPLIST = shops/fuel/food within this of the line
config.//bike: bike/sports shops (cat 'b', 🔧) searched a bit wider — riders detour for a repair

manual_shops.//: BK Oppdal — only chain on route; NOT in OSM, added from local knowledge. VERIFY lat/lon.
manual_shops.name: Burger King Oppdal

manual_shops.//: Rattana Thaimat takeaway, Åndalsnes — NOT in OSM, local knowledge. Address Gamle Romsdalsvegen 5, 6300 Åndalsnes; lat/lon verified from Google Maps pin (km 378.6, ~95 m off route).
manual_shops.name: Rattana Thaimat

manual_shops.//: Pizza Viva Napoli Hellesylt AS, Hellesyltvegen 33, 6218 Hellesylt — local knowledge. lat/lon geocoded from address (km 484.8, ~14 m off route).
manual_shops.name: Pizza Viva Napoli

manual_shops.//: Aursjøhytta DNT/KNT mountain lodge on the Aursjøvegen at the Aursjø dam — warm food for racers (local/race knowledge, staffed-summer hut not a normal shop). lat/lon from Nominatim 'Aursjøhytta (KNT)' (km 247, ~22 m off route). Seasonal Jun-Sep, staffed afternoons ~13:00+.
manual_shops.name: Aursjøhytta (DNT/KNT)

shop_flags.hours: Mo-Fr 10:00-18:00 manned (24h self-service = Norwegian BankID only)
shop_flags.note: OSM tags it 24h, but that's the døgnåpent self-service (Coop app + Norwegian BankID) — useless to foreign riders. Manned Mo-Fr 10-18, Sat to 16, closed Sun. Override hours so a rebuild doesn't re-import the 24h tag.

shop_flags.hours: Mo-Fr 10:00-18:00 manned (24h self-service = Norwegian BankID only)
shop_flags.note: OSM tags it 24h, but that's the døgnåpent self-service (Coop app + Norwegian BankID) — useless to foreign riders. Manned Mo-Fr 10-18, Sat to 16, closed Sun. Override hours so a rebuild doesn't re-import the 24h tag.

detour_towns.name: Stryn
detour_towns.note: route doesn't enter — use Joker Hjelledalen

ferry.note: GPX line snaps over land here (no gap) — not auto-detectable; confirmed by rider. Only ferry on route.
ferry.//detect: after swap, confirm the route still crosses Storfjorden here; ferry km = the Stranda/Liabygda waypoint km

climb_names.//: marquee passes — a regenerated climb whose summit is within 4 km gets this name. Approx coords; verify after swap.
climb_names.name: Aursjovegen (Sunndal wall)

editorial_blocks.//: Prose with km in it — re-review after swap. Stored so nothing is silently lost.

wpts_base.name: Tolga — START/FINISH
wpts_base.desc: Small village. Coop/Joker. Start & finish.

wpts_base.name: Tynset
wpts_base.desc: Regional town: Rema/Coop/Kiwi; Circle K 06:30–22:00 (NOT 24h); Intersport bike service; pharmacy, hospital. Best early resupply.

wpts_base.name: Kvikne
wpts_base.desc: Tiny: Joker + fuel pump. Long gap after.

wpts_base.name: Berkåk / Rennebu
wpts_base.desc: On E6: Coop, Circle K/Shell 24h, hot food.

wpts_base.name: Oppdal
wpts_base.desc: Town: Coop Extra/Mega, Rema, Kiwi; Circle K 06:00–22:00 (+24h Uno-X/automat, fuel only); sport shops w/ bike service. Last big town before Sunndalen.

wpts_base.name: Gjøra
wpts_base.desc: Small Joker shop. Start of fjord descent.

wpts_base.name: Sunndalsøra
wpts_base.desc: Sea-level fjord town: Coop/Rema/Kiwi/Bunnpris; Circle K 07:00–23:00 (+Uno-X automat 24h); sport shop. Warm. Possible early bivy.

wpts_base.name: Aursjøvegen — 920m
wpts_base.desc: The Sunndal wall: +899 m gravel climb out of Sunndalsøra, and the start of the 115 km Aursjøvegen/Eikesdal gap. Exposed, remote, no services — carry food and layers.

wpts_base.name: Eresfjord
wpts_base.desc: Joker + fuel. Remote.

wpts_base.name: Åndalsnes
wpts_base.desc: Sea-level town: Coop/Rema/Kiwi; Circle K/Esso to 24:00 (midnight); sport shops (outdoor hub), train. ~1/3 mark.

wpts_base.name: Trollstigen — 860m
wpts_base.desc: Iconic 11-hairpin climb out of Åndalsnes, +822 m. Tourist traffic; seasonal café/fuel near the top. Exposed up high.

wpts_base.name: Stranda
wpts_base.desc: Town: Coop Extra/Rema/Kiwi, 24h fuel, sport shop, ferry.

wpts_base.name: Hellesylt area
wpts_base.desc: Village: Spar/Joker, fuel, ferry.

wpts_base.name: Strynedalen — Stryn 9 km W
wpts_base.desc: Route follows Strynedalen valley (hamlets Storesunde/Meland/Fosnes); does NOT enter Stryn town — a ~9 km detour W. Stryn town has the last full supermarkets (Coop/Rema/Kiwi/Bunnpris), fuel + bike service before the high passes — worth the detour to stock up for Strynefjellet→Sognefjellet (~130 km, sparse). On-route: Joker Hjelledalen (km 537, Mo-Sa 06:00-24:00) is the real last resupply before Strynefjellet — so the Stryn detour is only needed on Sundays.

wpts_base.name: Grotli Pass — 1137m
wpts_base.desc: High exposed pass. Grotli hotel/fuel (seasonal). Cold/windy. Full kit, not a bivy spot.

wpts_base.name: Bismo / Skjåk
wpts_base.desc: Coop Marked/Joker, fuel. Small.

wpts_base.name: Lom
wpts_base.desc: Outdoor hub, 392m: Coop, Joker, famous bakery; Circle K 07:00–22:00 (Sun 09:00); bike service. LAST town before Sognefjellet.

wpts_base.name: Sognefjellet — 1421m
wpts_base.desc: ROUTE HIGH POINT, Europe's highest pass road. Snow walls in July, near-freezing, ~40km no services. Cross rested & fully dressed. DO NOT bivy.

wpts_base.name: Øvre Årdal
wpts_base.desc: Sea-level fjord town (12m), warmest & most sheltered mid-race spot. Coop/Rema/Spar, 24h fuel, sport shop. After Sognefjellet, before Valdresflye. RECOMMENDED bivy.

wpts_base.name: Tyin / Filefjell — 1076m
wpts_base.desc: Major +1056m climb straight off sea-level Øvre Årdal. Exposed high section, cold/windy, no services. Full kit, not a bivy spot.

wpts_base.name: Vang i Valdres
wpts_base.desc: Coop/Joker/Spar, fuel, 470m.

wpts_base.name: Beitostølen
wpts_base.desc: Resort, 893m: Coop/Spar, fuel, bike rental+service. Last services before Valdresflye.

wpts_base.name: Valdresflye — 1390m
wpts_base.desc: Exposed high plateau, 2nd highest point. Cold/windy, no services. Full kit. DO NOT bivy.

wpts_base.name: Gjendesheim / Maurvangen
wpts_base.desc: DNT lodge + camping + café (seasonal). Water/food.

wpts_base.name: Vågåmo
wpts_base.desc: Town, 366m: Coop Extra/Joker/Spar, fuel, sport shop.

wpts_base.name: Otta / Sel
wpts_base.desc: Regional hub: Coop/Rema/Kiwi; ✅ Circle K E6 OPEN 24h (manned, hot food/coffee); Intersport bike, train. Only on-route 24h station.

wpts_base.name: Dovre / Grimsdalen — 1170m
wpts_base.desc: High Dovrefjell road, exposed, remote, late & tired. Cold. Full kit.

wpts_base.name: Folldal — village 6.5 km N
wpts_base.desc: Route crosses Folldal MUNICIPALITY (Grimsdalen/Dovrefjell high country) but the VILLAGE is ~6.5 km N off-route. The Dovre→Alvdal leg is an 89 km gap with NO on-route shop — carry food, or detour ~6.5 km N to Folldal village (Coop). First services after: Circle K Alvdal 24/7 (km 1066).

wpts_base.name: Alvdal
wpts_base.desc: Village: Coop Extra/Prix, Kiwi, fuel. Last resupply before finish.

//wpts_base: the 29 curated schedule waypoints (lat/lon + hand-written desc). Pipeline re-snaps km, flags any now off-route; add new-town wpts by hand after swap.
